remarks: Great opportunity for a buyer or investor to own this Bruce Park walk to train and town center two-family home. There are 2 side-by-side units. The 700 SF unit (A) is a luxurious 2-Bedroom 1 bath retreat with designer touches: gut renovated gem offers a harmonious blend of modern comfort and upscale living. Custom-designed kitchen which boasts a Bertazoni range and custom cabinetry, creating a culinary haven for food enthusiasts. Elegant bathroom showcases Carrera marble and top-of-the-line Kohler fixtures. Unique and functional split-Level layout: on the first floor, you'll find the kitchen and dining area, while the upper level has the bedroom, bathroom, and a 2nd bedroom or office and a laundry room. Abundant Natural Light, creating an inviting and airy atmosphere. Unit B is a 2 floor unit with 1200 SF-The main floor-Living room, dining room, eat-in-kitchen, bedroom and full bath. Upstairs bedroom #2, office or 3rd bedroom option, full bath and laundry room. Prime location: conveniently situated within walking distance to the Metro-North train station and the upscale shopping of Greenwich Avenue, this unit offers seamless accessibility. Don't miss out on this exceptional opportunity! Make this exquisite space your new home and rent out the other side as an income producer.
